# Memact

Memact is source-available infrastructure for permissioned memory access.

## Summary

Memact lets apps create permissioned memory from a user's digital activity. Apps ask for memory access. Users choose what they get.

## Key pages

- https://www.memact.com/
- https://www.memact.com/learn/
- https://github.com/Memact
- https://github.com/Memact/Website
- https://github.com/Memact/Access

## Core concepts

- Permissioned memory
- Access layer and permission console
- Scoped API keys
- Activity categories
- Connect App consent flow
- Schema packets
- Memory graph permissions

## Short definition

Memact is infrastructure that lets apps create permissioned memory from your digital activity.
